title: Flosetira
description: A mod that adds new weapons & blocks
body:
![Flosetira](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83836bb3886a21b580c1f4560ff239e5e769b226.png)


## Sopianium Smithing Template & Ingot

The Smithing template can be found in shipwrecks, the alloy is made from 1 Netherite Ingot, 1 Iron Ingot and 1 Redstone Dust.

## Sopianium Trident

Trident that always has riptide, it has 3 charges that slowly recharges by themselves.

Enchantments:

- Overdrive

Bypasses the charge cooldown. You take 1 heart of damage for every bypassed charge.

- Rapid Charge

Have fewer charges, but cooldown is faster.

- Market Gardener

Reduces your charges to one, while falling you deal more damage.

## Fire Breather

A gub that shots out fire charges.

Enchantments:

- Burst

Shot out multiple fireballs.

- Cache

Heats up slower, increasing how much you can use the weapon.

- Propane Tank

Replaces the fireball with flames.

# Weapons Sets

## Lances

Lances has the ability to do a dash using right-click.

The lances has 3 tiers. Iron, Diamond and Netherite, which each tier their cooldown decreases by 1 second (3 second at Netherite).

It has 2 unique enchatments

- Velocity

Boosts the velocity of your dash.

- Chivalry

While riding a horse, your lance deals more damage.

## Naginatas

Similarly, like the lances it has 3 tiers.

It has higher reach but slower attack speed than their sword counterparts.

# Other Weapons

## TNT Launcher

It's a pistol that shots out TNT, it has a clip size of 2 and has to be reloaded by clicking on it with TNT in your inventory.

## Gilded Halberd

It's an Axe Weapon (has only axe enchantments) has the ability to right-click to do a secondary attack.

# Sopianium Display Block & Tuner

## Display Block

A simple block which you can right-click with any item/block to display it. You need iron pickaxe to mine it after you placed it.

## Display Block Tuner

Allows you to modify how your item/block are displayed by the Display Block, use right-click on the air to change the modes, and shift right-click on the block to change the settings of the block.

Modes:
- Y Offset, change the height of the displayed item/block
- Enable Display Spin, makes it so the displayed item/block is spinning
- Display Rotation, rotates your displayed item/block by 45 degrees
- Display Size, changes your displayed item/block size

# Other Blocks
 
## Pool Tiles

It has a block, slab and a stair variant.

## Light Rods

Introduces 5 "colored" end rods without the nubs.
